channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.116】Visual Studio 代码 1.116
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.116 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.116 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Announcing Azure MCP Server 2.0 Stable Release for Self-Hosted Agentic Cloud Automation】宣布推出适用于自托管代理云自动化的 Azure MCP Server 2.0 稳定版
item.description: 【We're excited to announce the stable release of Azure MCP Server 2.0, a significant milestone for building secure and flexible agentic workflows on Azure. Azure MCP Server is open-source software that implements the Model Context Protocol specification and enables AI agen】我们很高兴地宣布 Azure MCP Server 2.0 的稳定版本发布，这是在 Azure 上构建安全、灵活的代理工作流的一个重要里程碑。 Azure MCP 服务器是开源软件，实现模型上下文协议规范并启用 AI agen

item.title: 【PowerShell MSI package deprecation and preview updates】PowerShell MSI 包弃用和预览更新
item.description: 【Beginning with PowerShell 7.7-preview.1 (April 2026), the MSIX package will be the primary installation method for PowerShell on Windows. We will no longer ship the MSI installer package for new PowerShell releases. For existing releases, including PowerShell 7.6, we will continue to provide MSI pack】从 PowerShell 7.7-preview.1（2026 年 4 月）开始，MSIX 包将成为 Windows 上 PowerShell 的主要安装方法。我们将不再为新的 PowerShell 版本提供 MSI 安装程序包。对于现有版本，包括 PowerShell 7.6，我们将继续提供 MSI 包

item.title: 【How do you add or remove a handle from an active Wait­For­Multiple­Objects?, part 2】如何从活动 WaitForMultipleObjects 添加或删除句柄？，第 2 部分
item.description: 【Last time, we looked at adding or removing a handle from an active Wait­For­Multiple­Objects, and we developed an asynchronous mechanism that requests that the】上次，我们研究了从活动的 WaitForMultipleObjects 添加或删除句柄，并且我们开发了一种异步机制，该机制请求

item.title: 【Putting Agentic Platform Engineering to the test】对代理平台工程进行测试
item.description: 【In Part 1 of this blog series set the stage for why platform engineering is being reshaped by agentic AI. (read it here) Basically we outline how instead of humans translating intent through layers of CLIs, SDKs, and b】在本博客系列的第 1 部分中，我们为为什么代理人工智能正在重塑平台工程奠定了基础。 （在此处阅读）基本上，我们概述了如何代替人类通过 CLI、SDK 和 b 层来翻译意图

item.title: 【What's new in Microsoft Foundry | March 2026】Microsoft Foundry 的新增功能 | 2026 年 3 月
item.description: 【TL;DR Foundry Agent Service (GA): The next-gen agent runtime is production-ready — Responses API-based, end-to-end private networking, MCP auth expansion (including OAuth passthrough), Voice Live preview, and hosted agents in 6 new regions. GPT-5.4 + GPT-5.4 Pro (GA): Produc】TL;DR Foundry 代理服务 (GA)：下一代代理运行时已做好生产准备 — 基于响应 API、端到端专用网络、MCP 身份验证扩展（包括 OAuth 直通）、语音实时预览以及 6 个新区域中的托管代理。 GPT-5.4 + GPT-5.4 Pro (GA)：产品

item.title: 【C++23 Support in MSVC Build Tools 14.51】MSVC 构建工具 14.51 中的 C++23 支持
item.description: 【We’re pleased to provide an update on C++23 support in the Microsoft C++ (MSVC) Build Tools. This blog post will cover the feature additions in MSVC Build Tools version 14.51, including C++23 language features, libraries, and ISO C++ Core Working Group (CWG) and Library Working Group (LWG) Issue resolutions. We’ll also discuss the plans fo】我们很高兴在 Microsoft C++ (MSVC) 构建工具中提供 C++23 支持的更新。本博文将介绍 MSVC 构建工具版本 14.51 中新增的功能，包括 C++23 语言功能、库以及 ISO C++ 核心工作组 (CWG) 和库工作组 (LWG) 问题解决方案。我们还将讨论以下计划

item.title: 【Foundry Local is now Generally Available】Foundry Local 现已全面上市
item.description: 【Today we’re thrilled to announce the General Availability (GA) of Foundry Local — Microsoft’s cross-platform local AI solution that lets developers bring AI directly into their applications across modalities like chat and audio, with no cloud dependency, no network laten】今天，我们很高兴地宣布 Foundry Local 全面上市 (GA)，这是 Microsoft 的跨平台本地 AI 解决方案，可让开发人员通过聊天和音频等方式将 AI 直接引入他们的应用程序，不依赖于云，也没有网络延迟

item.title: 【Running Multiple Instances of an Aspire AppHost Without Port Conflicts】运行 Aspire AppHost 的多个实例而不发生端口冲突
item.description: 【Running multiple instances of the same source code in parallel is increasingly common — especially with agentic development. Tools like VS Code Copilot's background agent create git worktrees to work on your code independently, AI agents spin up separate environments to test different approaches, and developers use multiple checkouts to w】并行运行同一源代码的多个实例越来越常见——尤其是在代理开发中。 VS Code Copilot 的后台代理等工具创建 git 工作树来独立处理代码，AI 代理启动单独的环境来测试不同的方法，开发人员使用多个签出来工作

item.title: 【How do you add or remove a handle from an active Wait­For­Multiple­Objects?】如何从活动的 WaitForMultipleObjects 添加或删除句柄？
item.description: 【Last time, we looked at adding or removing a handle from an active Msg­Wait­For­Multiple­Objects, and observed that we could send a message to both break】上次，我们研究了从活动的 MsgWaitForMultipleObjects 添加或删除句柄，并观察到我们可以向两个中断发送消息
